sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17507" key="*au)cw/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Αὐξώ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦς</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">αὐξάνω</etym>) <sense id="n17507.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">goddess of growth,</tr_> called to witness in an Athenian citizen's oath, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:35:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.35.2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.106</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
